title: pavonia flavoferruginea
intro: Pavonia flavoferruginea, also known as the golden rockmallow or yellow rockmallow, is a perennial herbaceous plant in the mallow family. The plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pavonia flavoferruginea include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
